shot_prompts.prompt:
Animate this premium 9:16 finance scene for a cinematic reel.
Scene purpose: hook.
Motion: rising camera glides, green glow pulses, upward parallax.
Camera: hard push-in that lands on the hero visual.
Motion language: rising camera glides, green glow pulses, upward parallax. Smooth, high-end, no chaotic movement, no morphing artifacts.
Important: No readable text. No fake numbers. No fake stock tickers. No fake company logos. No buy/sell arrows. No trading signal visuals. No clutter. No cartoon style. No meme style. No cheap AI look. Leave clean negative space for text overlays and subtitles.
shot_prompts.seed_image_prompt:
Create a premium 9:16 finance scene still for Maven, an Indian stock market research brand — this frame will be animated into video.
Scene purpose: hook.
Visual concept: the single strongest scroll-stopping hero visual of the day's story — built around the motif: ascending data columns.
Style: premium financial newsroom, modern Indian stock market intelligence, cinematic data visualization, high-end dark finance aesthetic, clean market dashboard, elegant lighting, crisp depth, sophisticated motion graphics feel. Direction: Green Market Pulse — dark navy premium dashboard, green glowing cards, upward energy. Mood: confident, optimistic, premium. Palette accents: #0A1220, #27C281, #22D3EE.
Important: No readable text. No fake numbers. No fake stock tickers. No fake company logos. No buy/sell arrows. No trading signal visuals. No clutter. No cartoon style. No meme style. No cheap AI look. Leave clean negative space for text overlays and subtitles.
Output: vertical 9:16, high resolution, clean, premium, visually captivating.
shot_prompts.negative_prompt: cheap stock market video, random candlestick spam, low quality AI artifacts, fake numbers, readable nonsense text, fake logo, clutter, meme style, cartoon bull, cartoon bear, buy signal, sell signal, trading call, overexposed, blurry, ugly text, distorted charts, watermark, 3D coins
